---
title: "Brain & Cognitive Science I"
subtitle: "An interactive textbook · BCOG 100 · University of Illinois"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    format-links: false   # the landing page needs no PDF of itself
---

Welcome. This is the online textbook for **BCOG 100 — Introduction to Brain
and Cognitive Science**. The course studies the human mind and brain through
the lens of its evolutionary development: each module shows how a step in
evolution added a capacity that solved a problem for the organism, with
parallels to artificial intelligence drawn throughout.

Each module gives you three things: a **reading** you can view here or
[download as a PDF](course_overview/course_overview_reading.pdf), the
lecture **slides**, and a hands-on **interactive lab** that runs in your
browser on any device.

## Start here

- [**Module 0 · Course Overview**](course_overview/course_overview_reading.md) —
  what brain and cognitive science is, and how this course approaches it.

## The interactive labs

The simulations and lab activities live in a companion app that runs in any
browser — Mac, Windows, Linux, or Chromebook, with nothing to install.

[Open the interactive labs →](https://jonwillits.github.io/bcogapp/){.btn-pdf}

---

*This textbook is open source (GPL v3). Source and issues on
[GitHub](https://github.com/jonwillits/intro_to_bcs).*
